name: BIALETTI INDUSTRIE
summary: Bialetti Industrie S.p.A. is an Italian manufacturer of cookware, small appliances, and coffee makers, including the famous Moka Express stovetop espresso maker, headquartered in Coccaglio, Italy. They design, manufacture, and sell a wide range of products for the kitchen and home. Bialetti is known for its iconic designs and quality products.
